reviews.review_text: Amenities and grounds well maintained and very clean. We were on a powered sites which was level. Location is very central so we could walk everywhere.

We were caravanning with family @ Big 4 Caloundra & we all had a WONDERFUL time. Large well-maintained sites, clean & tidy amenities, great facilities - beautiful pool area, restaurant/bar overlooking the pool area, coffee van & the park's location is so central to everything. Shopping centre across the road, Caloundra CBD just up the road, coastal walkways & bike paths, Bulcock beach just around the corner, lots of food options available. Thank you for a great stay Big 4 Caloundra! We'll be back!

I had a Powered Site. It's a quiet Park with an excellent Pool, Water Slides (even for Adults and I'm 65) and the On-site Restaurant is very good as well. The Coffee Van was disappointing. $8 Large Coffee with Raisin Toast but couldn't really taste the weak coffee. Fortunately there are other Coffee Venues close by.
Amazing Park! Meals at restaurant are amazing and great price- will keep rebooking! Love love love

Very good,  near shops and restaurants,  very clean not noisy,  gave us a good camp site to get in and out .plenty of food places,  good walks, the showers are spotless and camp kitchen cleaned everyvday really had a good time. Will tell our family and friends 🧡 good place to have a break. Going to the RSL tonight last night 🌙 here it is the biggest RSL we have been to plenty of chose to eat . Don't have drive to far to have a good time loved it
Wonderful place for a little family getaway, the kids loved it!
Great Park, lots to do, eat and drink and well located
Great location and facilities
Beautiful park with very friendly staff nothing was too much trouble.
Amazing park, highly recommend

Amazing stay for our first visit to the Sunshine Coast. The Caloundra Big 4 was the perfect location to set out and return to  with perfect activities for kids and lovely meals at the restaurant with live music and happy hour. Stunning walks along the coast just a step out of the park and morning coffees hit the spot every day. We will definitely return again with extended family! Perfect location.

Had such a lovely stay at Big 4 Caloundra Waterfront Holiday Park. The villas were super clean, modern, and had great facilities. Really impressed with how family-friendly the place is, especially for little kids. We asked for a cot and they went above and beyond by also providing extra baby blankets, baby towels, and cot sheets, such a thoughtful touch and it really helped my babies sleep better.

The whole park feels quiet and relaxing, perfect for families wanting a little getaway. The location is amazing too, easy walk along the coast and close to cafes, restaurants, Coles and Woolies. My kids absolutely loved the water park and didn’t want to leave! Also really enjoyed the coffee from Tom and Andy Coffee Van. Would definitely love to come back again❤️

We had a wonderful stay at BIG4 Caloundra Waterfront Holiday Park. The park was so quiet and relaxing, with incredibly friendly staff who made us feel very welcome from the moment we arrived. Everything was spotless and exceptionally clean, and the location right on the water was perfect. It’s also central to everything you need, making it so easy to get around and enjoy the area. We’ll definitely be back!

This is our 3rd visit to this wonderful park, that has something to suit everyone, from  the service, amenities and the location is 2nd to none. The staff are wonderful  and most of all we will keep coming back.
We love it.
Great facilities! Tom and Andy’s have great coffee!

I spent 2 nights here with my girls. Everything was great but I wanted to mention the cleaners in particular. This is by far the cleanest campground I have stayed at. Showers, toilets, kitchen, everywhere really, was always spotless. Good job cleaners!

This is Simply the Best Caravan park in Queensland,  cannot find a fault. The park, amenities,  service and staff are 10 STAR. Don't drive by.
DRIVE IN, YOU WONT BE DISAPPOINTED.

Awesome caravan park. Close enough to everything you need to be close to.
Pool area and heated pool is awesome.
Can’t fault anything, amenities are very clean.
Well done Caloundra Big 4

Have loved our time here and are sad to leave. Staff are lovely, beautiful location and facilities are fantastic!
Will be back as soon as possible

First impressions really matter. From the reception, to the room, and the staff we have met so far, have made us feel nothing but warmth and welcome. If this is the beginning, we cant wait to see what the rest of our stay is like!
Excellent park with fabulous facilities including Tripcony Traders Bar and Restaurant. Food, cocktails snd service are all first class.

Best holiday destination !!!! This is where real family memories are made

Booking name Ridgewell
Loved our stay at Big4 Caloundra. Facilities are clean and it’s set up perfectly for families! We will definitely be back

This park was a last minute booking for us and it’s absolutely beautiful we are loving it bring your bug spray as the midges are something else but you get these everywhere at the moment!  highly recommend this prark

The park is excellent, grounds, camp kitchen , pool and Tripcony cafe.
Highly recommend a caravan stay here.
Robinson, sites 50.
Amazing holiday location.  Great food and service at the Tripcony Restaurant,  loved the Happy Hour Cocktails!
We having such a wonderful time in this piece of paradise. 😀 The services are the best we have encountered on our travels.
Today is my second time around ! And I al stating foe 2 weeks! Love this place so much

Great Service, Good Vibe and Good Food.
Pool area amazing, modern facilities.

Absolutely amazing park for everyone!
Great facilities and present and caring staff around the park always chatty, friendly and offering help. The park is always clean and well maintained and has a huge variety of activities for the kids. The kids activities co ordinator Nick is amazing with kids.
Lovely caravan park ,clean and the amenities were very clean , the po6 was lovely

Stayed 3 nights mid-week in May, on a powered, drive-through caravan site. ||Things we liked:|The location is perfect ...  right on the water, and close to everything.  The astro-turf on the site was well maintained and soft underfoot. The park is modern, clean and beautifully landscaped throughout. The sites are adequate, but not huge. Amenities are clean and modern. Nice pool, kids play area and restaurant on the ocean side. For security, guests have key-access to enter the park, from the public walkway. ||Things we didn't like:|A salt-water creek runs through the middle of the park, and sand flies were a problem from dawn till 10am and from 3pm till dark. Even a stiff breeze didn't deter them. Traffic noise was constant until midnight, even though it was mid-week.  We ran the air-conditioner, to block it out.

We were camping for the weekend with the family…. Great experience, very clean amenities and kitchen…lovely swimming pool with awesome new slides, a really nice jumping pillow, pity thats the only kids attraction/entertainment they can do with a proper playground for the kids!!!
We will definitely by back!!

We loved our stay here!! Feels like you’re staying at an all inclusive holiday resort anywhere in the world. Everything at your fingertips or within walking distance. Great food and great coffee! Fun for all ages!! Exceptional service :)
Loved our stay, perfect location, great pool and slides for the kids. Cabin was a bit expensive but it was the long weekend. We would highly recommend this park for a couple or families.

Thankyou Caloundra BIG4, we had a lovely breakaway.
Everything is close by, Shops, Restaurants and Beach.
We wanted to say a Special Thankyou to the lovely young lady that works there, she was cleaning the amenities block when we had to use the laundry services and when we realised that we didn’t have the right coins with us, or a digital credit card on our phone to operate the machines we couldn’t use them.
She instantly bought out her phone and paid for our Washing to be done.
I’m sorry that I didn’t get your name that day, but your kindness and generosity have left a lasting expression on our holiday that made it even more wonderful.
Thankyou
Barbara and Peter
Der Campingplatz ist blitzsauber und wunderschön! Ein richtiges Luxuserlebnis. Man fühlt sich sofort wohl. Das Personal ist super nett.

First time we stay there and LOVE the warmer pool water. We had lunch at the resort restaurant and it was awesome. Also the coffee at the van before the walk was goooood. Thanks everyone specially the girls at the reception. Nice to see smiley faces every day. 🤗🤗🏖️
M. Barnard

We had a fantastic stay at the BIG4 Calandra for 3 nights. It is definitely the most luxurious caravan park I’ve ever stayed in. The site was very spacious and well kept. The kitchen and bathroom facilities were extremely clean – the best I’ve ever seen. Not to mention Tripcony‘ Traders. It’s such a treat to have a restaurant onsite. We arrived and had coconut mango margaritas which was delicious. The next night we had a schnitzel and salmon. It was nice to have the option not to cook. The swimming pool is very glamorous. It was a shame to leave and continue with our journey, but I look forward to coming back again.

Thanks,
Shireen Santos
Service was excellent and the food was great and at a great price.
Great location and great amenities

Lovely site, pool and slides enjoyed all weekend even in the rain! Amenities always kept so clean and tidy.
Food was amazing and cocktails ordered so tasty, staff always friendly and happy to help, will definitely be returning :)

Great location and nice sized caravan sites
Clean facilities and friendly service

We have stayed at Caloundra Big 4 many times on sites and in cabins and it’s has always been an amazing stay. Perfect location, close to shops and beaches. No need to drive anywhere. The staff are always polite and accomodating. It is our kids favourite place to holiday and since the new pool and amenities it is next level.

Really great spot to enjoy all that Caloundra offers and all within walking distance. The amenities are spotless and very modern and the staff are friendly and helpful. Great little restaurant and cocktail bar onsite too!
Tracy & David Couper

Great location - many cabins with ocean views. Direct access to beach. Van sites with grass and plenty of room. Lovely coffee van for the best coffee and milkshakes. Restaurant overlooking the pool.  Fantastic park for families with pool, jumping pillow, pedal bikes and carts and daily activities for kids.  Communal fire pit, amenities well keep.  All in all a lovely park in a beautiful part of the Sunshine Coast
We are 3 days into our 5 night stay and loving it so far, the restaurant is perfect for an easy meal or takeaway, coffee van is a very nice touch - the villa has everything we need!
Just checked in and the staff could not have been more helpful. Managed to change our powered site away from the road. We have now had a good look around and the facilities are very clean and modern
Great location,  you can walk to the beach or downtown.  All amenities are clean and first class.

Only stayed for 2 nights and unfortunately bad weather and they closed pool first day for a few hours and then asked for late checkout weeks ahead and was told they wouldn’t know till day before. Pretty quiet time with plenty of sites available and still can’t make it work. Disappointing
Excellent location, very professional and pleasant staff, well maintained and beautiful resort style park

We had the most wonderful family holiday staying in a cabin. The pool was spectacular, coffee can delicious and every meal we had t the restaurant was fantastic. The playground great for our little kids too. All staff were so lovely and friendly. The gardens were beautiful and well maintained, it felt like we were at a luxury resort!  We had a brilliant time that we cousins leave without booking in for another trip next year! Best holiday park there is!

From grounds staff to the reception staff, 💯 professional service! Could not do enough for you, way and above their role requirements! Friendly and respectful!
AND the facilities, best ever grounds, camp kitchen is like a five star restaurant. It’s d St o relaxing, quiet and peaceful! EXACTLY what I paid for and worth every cent. Brilliant team. Congratulations!!
Katie Jardine
Brisbane Staying to visit my Mum in hospital on Sunny Coast. Not a vacation but pretty close!! I had beach swims and loved the proximity. The price is very, very reasonable.

This is our second stop over at the Big4 in Caloundra. We enjoy the surrounds and being close to the centre of Caloundra.

So much on offer here, with a great water park and slides for the kids and big kids. The restaurant and bar are a great attraction, especially for happy hour. Food is top shelf also

The service provided by staff is also professional and supportive. Amenities in the park are spotless and and always very well presented. Highly recommend if you are wanting a relaxing stop in Caloundra.

Mary Savage (Brisbane)

10/10 one of the best Big 4 locations I have been to with the family!

With young children, it has been a great experience so far! Beautiful scenic view of the ocean by the pool and great customer service!
Love sitting on the outdoor area having a drink and a meal overlooking the pool and beach activities.

Excellent double slab caravan sites in a good location in the park,
Recent renovations are great, will be back again,

Highly recommend Big 4 Caloundra! The location has everything you would need and more! From child friendly activities such as jumping pillows, water slide and park, to table service by the pool for refreshing cocktails!

I will definitely be coming back!

A call out for Nick Butler from the Big 4 Caouloundra. Nick must be the most welcoming happy chap in the whole of the area.

He always has a smile on his face, and offers kind greetings to all. Nothing seems to be too much trouble, for Nick.

You rock, Nick, and thankyou for being you 💜🙏🙏🙏🙏
Great location, great rooms. Only would like the pool to be open longer and for there to be a broom in our room so we could clean easily.
Best campsite we had during our trip along east cost
Great Spot. Friendly personal. Specially Taj and Tracy are very helpful. Ty a lot guys. Hope to be your guest again in the futur

Jumping pillow is terrible.
Nick for the kids entertainment was fantastic. He is a real asset and the kids loved him.
Had a blast and bingo, trivia and the soccer was a hit with all the kids..
First visit and very impressed with the facilities and rooms. The pool is the best we’ve been to.
Clean and beautiful rooms. Awesome pool and fabulous service by the pool too.
If you’re looking for a resort style accommodation but you love to caravan..well this is the place to be!..Gannon Booking

Great location ,shops all around.
Staff and team friendly and accommodating.
Park is super clean !
Great facilities

Lovely, well maintained park. Lots of greenery between each campsite, which is not always found at similar caravan parks. Excellent customer service from at staff, very helpful with all enquiries. Kids really loved the pool and pedal cars. Highly recommend.
Great location, bartender is amazing, so relaxed
Amazing ! Loved our stay here, will be back again!

We had a fantastic stay at Caloundra BIG4! Our small cabin was the perfect size for our family of two adults and two kids—it felt cozy and had everything we needed.
One of the best parts was the layout; we were within short walking distance of all the amenities and had convenient parking right at our door. The surroundings are absolutely beautiful and well-maintained. To top it off, the customer service was excellent throughout our visit.
We will definitely be coming back!

Thank
Noora Fareez
Camp site are clean , friendly staff and the pool and cafe is amazing. Camp site 56.
This is our third time eating at tripcony traders. Highly recommend the calamari and the pizza! Excellent value for money

We are staying in a caravan site by the restaurant and pool and am having an absolute blast! We only live down the road but walk past the slides and pool all the time and wanted to check it out for ourselves! Awesome family vibe, kids and dogs are welcome. Beautiful icecream for the kids and the meals are great with really great pricing. The cocktails can be served to you will lounging on a sunlounger...don't need to go to Fiji when you can stay here!

Great park.
Camp kitchen is perfect, with everything you need on hand.
Then by the pool, Spiced Margaritas are the best.
Great park!! Sensational facilities and staff always ready to help out anytime!! Highly recommend

Booking Reference: 60121827

We had a great evening at Tripcony. Our meals were very tasty and service was prompt and extremely friendly. The atmosphere at the restaurant is really nice sitting by the pool and we always look forward to having a meal here when we stay at Big4 Caloundra. We don't usually eat onsite and usually always just eat our own food or go outside the park but when we stay here we always ensure to eat here at least one night per stay and always enjoy it.. Bring back the poke bowls :) !!!

Great spot, our son loved it, facilities are new and still very nice. Premium site are the right size of large to spread out a little and have some space. Sites are well maintained and great they are flat and all still level ;). Guests (over the school hols) are the like minded kind and respectful and all played well together, no rowdy rowdies. Have booked and dotted our future stays throughout the year when we will bring out fur kid as well.

Great place to stay. Great for the grand kids. Awesome swimming pool. Clean and tidy.
We will definitely be back again.
Camp ground amenities are very clean. Artificial turf sites suitable for tents and caravans - very well maintained. Kids love the pool and slides. Pizzas are a great option at the bistro.

Love the place and love our villa.
The kids love the waterslide and it’s so convenient.
Mad 🤙 park!
Loving our stay at big 4 caloundra! Kids are having the time of their life!
Food awesome, service and speed really good, highly recommended !!
Great food and drink. The service staff are great too
Incredible spot! Kids are having the time of their lives and the amenities and activities on offer are fantastic
Perfect stay unbelievably good service nice staff everyone likes to help each other thank you.
Best park on the sunshine coast for kids&adults - great facilities, clean villas & kids activities on daily. We've been multiple times and just love this place! 💖💖💖
Lovely staff!
Brilliant location, amenities very well cared for and lots of activities for the kiddies

We are having such a great stay at BIG4 Caloundra!

The location is absolutely perfect, right on the water and close to everything, which made it so easy to get around.

The park itself is super clean and well maintained, and the facilities are amazing. The pool and water slides were a highlight (especially for kids), and everything felt really modern and well looked after.
Staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay, and the whole place has such a fun, relaxed vibe. It really feels more like a little resort than a caravan park.

We’ll definitely be back and would highly recommend to anyone looking for a family-friendly getaway on the Sunshine Coast!

We love the Big 4 Caloundra!
The park is beautiful, staff are friendly and helpful and it’s the best location!
Great clean park , near to beaches, walk into town . We will be back

Five stars all round. This is the caravan park you want to be at especially if you have children. Beautiful facilities and great location. Easter school holidays so many activities for kids to do for free. Our second year in a row and we will be back.

Great place to holiday.been he many tiles and will keep coming back.
Wilcox
Our second time here! Such a great park! The pool is warm and a massive hit with the kids! It’s safe and has excellent amenities including an accessible camp kitchen. Sites are nice and private!
Having a great time. Weather is amazing. Staff is fantastic. It’s our 4th here and we will continue to come back. Fraser C34
Currently staying on a caravan site absolutely amazing site, location, facilities and staff. Pool is a gem and trip traders amazing drinks and food
Great spot. Lots of activities for the kids! Plenty to do and it’s dog friendly. How good!
Site 69

Such an amazing stay at Caloundra big 4. We stayed in one of the hibiscus villas and had an amazing view and close to everything. The resort is perfect for a family getaway with great pool side food and entertainment.

Just enjoyed a wonderful 4 day vacation there
The villa we were in was amazing.  Clean, well appointed with everything you would need and close to everything.  The pool and slides provided a lot of family fun. The food was good, plentiful, and ready in a short period of time which was great when feeding toddlers.  The morning was highlighted with a visit(s) to the Coffee Canteen.  All staff were friendly and helpful and truly appear to enjoy working there.  Well done!

Great van park, walking distance to shops & restaurants. Great facilities, toilet/shower block immaculate (however were closed very early in mornings for cleaning). Bar/ restaurant on site very friendly staff reasonably priced, large pool. We will be back.
Fantastic caravan park. Great amenities. Easy walk to centre of Caloundra for Sunday markets. Shopping centre and places to eat out are an easy stroll

This is our first time staying at Big4 Caloundra and we will continue to come back. Fantastic amenities, beautiful pool area that the adults can enjoy a sneaky cocktail and still be in arms reach of the kiddies and feels like a safe environment for the kids to run around. Staff have been super friendly and helpful and the kids have slept 12+ hours so it’s a win in my eyes 😁
Staying on a powered site. AstroTurf great and clean amenities. Kids love the pool and slide

We stayed for 3 nights and the facilities are excellent! The camp kitchen is one of the best we have seen. We had dinner in the restaurant and the meals were reasonably priced and value for money. Wouldn’t hesitate to come again.
Great meals and reasonably priced

Best holiday. Can't fault!!! Have already rebooked 🙏
Renee Stirling
Great Caravan park with plenty of things for the kids to keep occupied! Recommend
Great park.  Great staff.  Great ammenities.  Great place to rest & unwind. Thats why we keep returning.
Great service , clean amenities a little bit of luxury close to home

Location is great, however a little noisy due to the main roads. The pool area and slides are awesome! The restaurant is good, however I wish there was a steak option on the menu and the Nachos came with no meat or melted cheese, for the price of them, that was a little disappointing but my burger was great.

Fast service, great cocktail, highly recommend ✨

Zoe Whipp

Will definitely come back to your park again 😁
Had a nice relaxing time here...staff are super friendly and really helpful.
Everything is really clean, neat and tidy and the pool area is like being in a 5star resort!

We stayed in a brand new Lilly Pilly villa and had a great time! The villa had everything we needed for our family and the park facilities and kids activities were awesome! We will definitely be back!
Great stay. Great staff, activities for kids. Couldn’t fault .

Amazing fun place for all! The pool and slides provide hours of fun. Lots of activities for the kids. Didn't end up going to the on site restaurant however, the cocktails all looked nice. The only downfall was we were there for 7 nights and no sheet change. Only a towel change mid stay.

We had the best time staying at BIG4 Caloundra , the staff were so helpful and were always happy, The amenities were clean and well kept. The facilities were 5 star food and drink service was amazing we will definitely be going back for another stay
Sehr schöner Park & sehr sauber. Nur 2 Lavabos sind zu wenig. Die Lage zum Einkaufen umd spazieren top. Sehr nett am Empfang.
everything is good, except the dryers in the amenities room has only 30 minutes cycle and is abit weak, it took me 4 cycles to fully dry my clothes, please upgrade it
great spot and good access to facilities beach and aus zoo

Big 4 Caloundra is hands down our favourite place to stay. We’ve actually made it a bit of a tradition and come here every March for my husband’s birthday — this is our third year in a row now, and we’ll keep coming back.

It’s just so family-friendly. The slide and pool area is a huge hit with the kids, and there’s so much here for them & us parents — playground, restaurant, poolside cocktails, the works. My kids absolutely love it, and it makes holidays feel so easy. I also love that the coffee van opens from 6am, which is perfect when you have early risers!!

You can tell they’re always improving and upgrading the park too, which makes such a difference. We even brought friends along with us this year, and they have loved it just as much.

We had dinner at Tripcony Traders one night for my husband’s birthday, and it was such a great experience. The service was incredible and they went above and beyond with little touches like birthday balloons, a complimentary dessert, and even singing happy birthday to him. The food was honestly elite, and the whole place had such a relaxed, welcoming vibe.

We’ll definitely be back there again during this trip as well. Highly recommend for families — it’s just the best.

We first stayed here just over a month ago, and are back on our second trip.

Quickly became a family favourite.
The pool is a huge hit with the kids, and very family friendly, with bar service for the adults !
Great facilities and spacious sites.

Located right by the beach and the shops!
Great place for a long weekend

Kimberly Breed
Fifth time staying amazing family holiday destination. highly recommend

I was staying on a standard site which gave me plenty of room for my truck. All the staff i met were friendly and efficient. The communal kitchen and amenities were immaculate and the grounds were tidy and well maintained. The site is within a few minutes walk of Coles,Woolworths,bottleshops, cafes and fast food. The coastal walking path is literally right outside the back gate. Highly recommended, i will return soon.

We booked a caravan site here as it’s now dog friendly which is fantastic. The park is close to everything, it has the most amazing amenities , huge sites and beautiful grounds . The girls in the office were very welcoming and super friendly. . The only thing I would complain about is having to pay for our little dog per night , we have been travelling for nearly 4 years now and it’s the first time we have come accross this extra charge .   I definitely would highly recommend this park the best we have ever stayed in .
great swimming pool and the amenaties are excellent would have to be the best caravan park in Queensland not cheap but you get what you pay for

Lovely van park in the heart of Caloundra. Amenities and facilities up to date and well maintained.Walking distance to shops,restaurants and takeaways.  Sites ok size but in certain  parts hard to get in to due to cars having to park on the road. Unfortunately most children seem to be unchecked and  unsupervised and ride their bikes,scooters all around the park at high speed. If your not into a holiday full of noisy kids, I would recommend giving this place a miss.

The staff are friendly and helpful,
Facilities are well maintained and being upgraded all the time.
On-site cafe and restaurant, I recommend trying the burgers.

We had the most wonderful stay at BIG4 Caloundra Waterfront Holiday Park in a Bunya Cabin and honestly didn’t want to leave!

The cabin was brilliant — spacious, super clean, comfortable, and absolutely perfect for our family of four. It had everything we needed and felt like a real home away from home.

The kids were in heaven with all the activities. From the waterslides and pool to the playground, go karts and the jumping pillow — there was never a dull moment. They were entertained from morning until night!

We also loved the restaurant — the food was fantastic, the cocktails were amazing, and the coffee was seriously good (which parents definitely appreciate on holiday!).

Such a fun, family-friendly place with a great atmosphere. We made so many special memories here and can’t wait to come back. Highly recommend for families looking for a fun and relaxing getaway! 🥰

We arrived in the rain and set up at a great site in our caravan, husband is in a wheelchair and everything is good. Park is kept in amazing condition. Highly recommend
Sandy and Peter
Been here 3 years in a row everything is spotless and well maintained staff are amazing and that's why we keep coming back ❤️❤️❤️
Great ammenities, location and family atmosphere
We feel like we are staying at a beautiful resort not a caravan park! Pool, restaurant, camp kitchen, herb garden and cocktails are all amazing!

Great place to stay and walk anywhere.  Clean and tidy. Lovely gardens behind your van for  privacy.  Amazing pool and lots to do with organised activities and happy hour at 4
#120205

We came into the park through a quite wet period but everything was great. No mud, pooling water and the sights are amazing 🤩
Could not stay at a better park
David and Krtry
Beautiful  park pool area is very well looked after restaurant 5 star, definitely recommend

Awesome park access for vans, site access was also good. Amenities always clean and great pool area. Nice view. Cabins also have a great view of the water. Would recommend to anyone looking for a getaway
We have stayed with our two young kids, and couldn’t recommend this place more! Great staff, great food, lovely amenities. So much to do for kids, and very close walking distance to shops etc!
Great place for a holiday or just a relaxing weekend, close to the water and shops,and fishing, I loved the place
Great caravan park, amenities, pool and pool side bar. Great for families and group get away.
It's a bit pricey for a powered site but the facilities are excellent. The pool is huge. The camp kitchen well equipped. The location is great.
Great place, close to all amenities
Great location. Beautifully clean & well maintained. As Big 4 Members we were disappointed that our ‘members benefit’ was 1 coffee voucher, to share between us!

Rooms don’t really accomodate for large families, rooms are
Tiny. No close bins, parking is a nightmare if you own a 4x4. Staff didn’t clean our cabin once,  we were told to go back to our room to bring old towels in to get new ones. Pool is closed way too early (6:30pm) no spray and wipe in rooms at all to keep clean in between stays. Shower floor mat big enough for a mouse. But everything in resort is clean. Haven’t seen one staff member on duty in the 5 days I’ve been here. For $1900 I expected at least one sachet of free laundry powder at least. Or a pass for one load etc
Wouldn’t spend my money here again. Not worth it

Brooke and Brie did a wonderful job preparing our villa for our stay, arriving after hours. Park general amenities were clean, tidy and accessible perfect for our family stay. The pool and waterwlides were a hit with our 3yo. Thanks for a great stay

The photos online do not do this place justice. My family and I did not get to stay long at all and it was windy and rained most of the time but that did not stop us from enjoying ourselves on the slides. We have decided we will definitely be back again. There is loads of activities for kids and the pool area and slides are a lot bigger then first thought. Thank you for such a memorable stay
Rooms  look 5 🌟, but we are in caravan Park , pool is great 👍

Brilliant park in a great location. All the amenities you could need on the park and plenty of shops and restaurants within walking distance. Friendly staff and daily events. The live music events are brilliant and the pool is amazing.
This is one of the best and cleanest parks we have stayed at. The gardens are amazing and the camp kitchen was just fantastic.
Great park friendly staff clean facilities.  Excellent location and value for money

Best park we have stayed in, great facilities, super clean amenities, large sites with garden bed privacy.
Bar, restaurant & coffee bar onsite.
More like a 5 star 🌟 resort than a caravan park. Only downside it’s also the most expensive park we have stayed in $100 ++ for a powered site so not for the budget conscience.

Best holiday park yet…. And the deals are amazing and staff have gone above and beyond for the kids . Love it so much we have made it our go  to destination… staff saw we turned up with four kids and a tent, they came out with blankets and other linen , and they are amazing with the kids. Love it and we recommend big 4 Caloundra for all holidays and get aways… and possibly perfect for that long awaited proposal to that special someone. Yours truely .. Alkira and Mikey on tent site 2
Best caravan park we've stayed in.  Amenities first class and very well maintained.
Great place, pool near the beach fabulous  van siyes really private and the restaurant has the best food. Been here several  times love it.
Currently having the best time, staff amazing, pool side drinks amazing 🤩  10/10
Awesome venue, amazing activities and specials. Really enjoy our time here, especially the water slides and YourMates craft beer selection!

Fabulous holiday stay. Close to shops, especially a wonderful seafood shop and the on site restaurant Tripcany Traders is awesome. We had a lovely bottle of wine and a pizza poolside. Couldn’t get much better

Unforgettable Family Stay at BIG4 Caloundra Waterfront

We recently enjoyed a 3-night family getaway (2 adults, 2 young kids) at BIG4 Caloundra Waterfront Holiday Park, and it exceeded all expectations!
Our first night was in the premium Hibiscus cabin, which offered unbelievable waterfront views—a truly serene way to start the trip. For the next two nights, we stayed in the Greyvillea cabin, which was similar in size and amenities but without the views. That said, it was conveniently located near the pool and came at a significantly lower price (over $100/night cheaper), making it a great value option.
Both cabins were well-equipped with excellent kitchen facilities—dishwasher, microwave, full-sized fridge, and complimentary coffee and tea. Everything was clean, modern, and family-friendly.
The large pool was the highlight for our kids (and us!). With a gentle gradient depth perfect for little ones and super fun water slides that even adults can enjoy, it kept everyone entertained for hours. Plenty of sun loungers and pool towels made relaxing easy.
We loved grabbing our morning coffee from Tom and Andy’s coffee cart, which had lovely water views. The resto bar overlooking the pool was another great touch—you can even order food and drinks poolside without leaving your lounger!
Our kids had an absolute blast, and we made some truly special family memories. Having visited several holiday parks up and down the east coast, this one stands out as the best we’ve experienced so far.
We’ll definitely be back—and next time, we’ll be booking well in advance!

My kids are more than old enough to go to the pool
And swim, nope needed a parent, and staff were quite rude when turning away the kids.
Restaurant is lovely, food was delish. But if I’m going to pay $22 for a cocktail can it at least be cold?
Also don’t even think about going around the park without a wrist band on…..oh and if you loose or break your wrist band (which aren’t made well), be prepared to pay $5 to get another one.
We had a good time, but we spent more time
Out of the park.

What a beautiful park!
I have visited dozens of holiday parks up and down the East Coast and this one is the one I keep coming back to.
The staff are so lovely and helpful with loads of smiles to share.
Location is awesome, right on the waterfront with heaps of places to ride bikes or go for a stroll down to one of the many beaches.
The pool area with waterslides is resort level and the restaurant overlooking is a wonderful place for a good feed and having a yarn.
The park honestly continues to get better and more inviting everytime we're there; feels like coming home.
don't know what to say ... a lil over priced ...but staff and facilities are great 👍

Right in the heart of Caloundra. Just OPP the main shopping centre..
More importantly very close to the beaches.
A fantastic walk from past here linking all the beaches for easy access.

Very tidy and well-equipped park that has amazing views of the waterways from both the pool and restaurant.
Amenities were always tidy, sites were a great size and staff were friendly. Lots for the kids to do while they were there - the slides and pool were a hit, but they also had some fun discos and  other kids activities on the go.

Food at the restaurant was the only disappointment. We booked a meal for our first night, my partners pizza was awful and late. Roast on the first night was amazing, very dry on Sunday at lunch. Whilst the food wasn't the best, I want to give a shout out to the staff delivering food and drinks - they were amazing.
If you are by the pool or relaxing on the deck, I would highly recommend the Mojito - probably the best I have ever had.

So impressed with the attention to detail .
Nikki serviced our room upon arrival and it was perfect.
Love the styling in the cabin too.

The campgrounds itself was great, clean facilities and family friendly.
Unfortunately for our experience there was made slightly unenjoyable due to the pool security guard that was on duty on the Saturday and Sunday who was boarder line harassing every single child and parent over and over. We totally understand safety and monitoring bad behaviour and his job is required, but he was on major power trip and every other family around was saying how ridiculous he was being. Constantly checking ours and our kids wrist bands when he just checked them 10 minutes ago. Unfortunately for this reason we wouldn’t return.

Just love it here, the pool, the restaurant, the coffee .

Walking distance to everything in Caloundra .

Will be back soon.
We really enjoyed our 3 night stay in the 2 bedroom villa. Loved the pool area, daily activities for the kids and location. We will definitely be back!
We've had an amazing time. Unlimited stuff to do, walk

⭐️Exceeded Expectations ~ Highly Recommend!
We had a wonderful experience at BIG4 Caloundra. Spacious camp sites. Beautifully presented, well maintained park! Amenities, Camp Kitchen (ultra clean!) and gardens are top notch. Pool & water slides overlooking the passage plus the kids activities was a big hit with our daughter.
Easy side gate access to walkways with  the beach, shops, cafes and restaurants virtually at your doorstep.
We would absolutely stay here again and recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing, family friendly, hassle-free getaway! Bonus point for being dog friendly. Our Frenchie will come with us next time 😄 Wallace Family (Biloela, CQ)

Great facilities and cleanliness was outstanding. Very professional setup and of course a beautiful pool.
Only downside is the noise from the busy road adjacent but the positives outweigh that.
Magic place.
Wonderful atay

Caloundra Big 4 did not disappoint! From their spacious sites to their family friendly facilities, everything is so well planned & thought out, with their customers in mind. We had a great time with our family & are happy to recommend this park to anyone.

We stayed for 5 nights on aite 84. Would highly recommend if you have a dog and like a little extra space. Its not next to any other caravan sites and with the cabins.
Access gate right at the site which was lovely for a morning and night stroll each day.
Deals at the restaurant each day and we had a pizza for lunch that was yummy. Facilities are top notch with being freshly renovated. Water slides were a huge hit with both the my son and us.
We will be back for a even longer stay next time
Very relaxing and nice park. Love the cafe overlooking the pool. Love that it is pet friendly. Will definitely be back.
Thank you so much Nikki for keeping our place nice and tidy! Your work is much appreciated

We stayed for 3 nights. Great park Great location Great service Clean friendly and safe.. We only live 45 minutes away and we're pleasantly surprised with our stay. Easy access to walkways and shops. Loved the camp fire. Our fur baby was welcome as well. We will be back.

i had an absolute blast at the big 4 caloundra. great food and drink at the restaurant/bar. the service was absolutely amazing. the guy bartender kai was so helpful and friendly. absolutely top notch.
Bungalows et places de camping très bien placés, directement sur la mer. Sanitaires et cuisine propres et parfaitement équipés. Grande piscine, restaurant et café. Très belle structure

Great location and facilities! Waterslides were a hit with the kids and bigger kids (adults)! We didn't have to leave the caravan park because it had everything. It is a short walk to the beach, shops and restaurants if we wanted though. Caravan sites were a little tight but otherwise great. The park itself was always clean and tidy, toilets and showers were always clean. Workers were lovely and friendly

This is a great park. We were in a cabin and it was great 👍
The staff were so friendly and kind.
The pool is the highlight made only better by poolside service 👌🏻

I would have also suggested a play park but they were just installing one as we finished our stay. A kids disco would also be great 👍

Everything about this park is 10 out of 10. The amenities, grounds , bar , food and activities for the kids is amazing. Can’t think of anything to find fault with , if I had to , I’d say an ice machine so we could top up the esky could be handy .
Best caravan park we stayed in.  Excellent amenities and beautiful pool area and restaurant.  Loved it.

Very clean ammenities, plenty of rubbish bins in the facility, very tidy and well maintained. Great Location.
I am a 1st timer in a Park, and the drive through site because of the vans parked either side, was very tight. As it was for other arrivals.
I should have used my reverse parking skills.

Our family of 4 had a great time at the Big4 Caloundra Waterfront. The pandanus cabin was absolutely beautiful, super clean and very comfortable. We loved the waterviews from our deck each morning while eating breakfast. The go karts, jumping pillow and of course the waterslides were a huge hit for our 4 year old. Both the staff and coffee at Tom and Andy's were delightful. We can't wait to come back!

Beautiful presented, well maintained park. Great clean amenities. Neat sites with artificial grass pad for van and annex. Plenty of space. Beat watermark pool overlooking the passage. You can sit on the deck of the bar and relax with a drink and food. Would definitely recommend it

We spent 2 night at the Big 4. The park was clean and tidy as were the amenities although very over priced. |It was however disappointing to only get one key for the amenities block, most parks we visited use a key pad to access the amenities. |It was also disappointing that in spite of being charged $10 a night for our dog there were no facilities provided. Many of the parks we visit where there is no charge have a dog hydro bath and increasingly an off leash area to give them a run in.
Very enjoyable and clean well maintained amenities

We had a great time with our young kids at Big 4. Accommodation was modern and clean (thanks Sienna).

Would recommend.
Great site.

Toilet needs a extraction fan.
Need more mirrors especially if girls are staying. Otherwise good room ,
Never stayed at a place where you have to remove your rubbish.  Especially when paying close to $400 a night and close to double in peak season. There also should be a carpark in the park for an extra car . Ridiculous that your told to park in a shopping centre carpark or on the side of the road .

Compared to other parks way to overcrowded.  Felt like the caravans were all cramped in.
Wasn't too impressed overall.
Great park but price is way above alternatives for what we need - eg we have no kids or pets.
Great resort feel park. Will be back
Upgraded facilities are awesome. More fun for families with kids

Friendly and helpful staff, a high level of park maintenance. Coffee van, restaurant, pooch friendly - lots of great walks and drives. Easy access to shopping. Fantastic Sunday market in Caloundra within walking distance. Loved it.
Amazing park close to shops everything is kept clean friendly staff restaurant food was so good
Such a wonderful feeling to arrive to a beautifully made Villa … Thank you Sienna for preparing it so nicely for us.
Family holidays look different with big 4! Big memories, big facilities, big location and big smiles! So impressed great for a short trip from Brisbane promise to make the next one longer!

Our family had an awesome time at the Big 4 holiday park.
Caloundra.
The park is absolutely beautiful.
Staff a friendly and greet you with a smile each time.
Very clean and tidy.
Poolside was amazing
Fire place were a plus when relaxing in the evening.
Close to shops, bars and restaurants.
We will definitely be back soon.

Excellent location.
Thank you for making our stay so enjoyable.

So when me and my more older friends went there lets just say we were more than disappointed about our stay. I wish I could get my money back but i was fuming and just left in utter disbelief. Not satisfied with this place. I would not recommend. :(

i was just visiting the so to call (great place) i booked for my family of 4 and when we arrived, we were greeted with a very bad smell it was like poo. And that is not even the worst part. This is a beautiful Caravan Park.  We have a caravan and the sites are all on artificial grass. The amenities are modern and clean and i have never seen such a large and modern camp kitchen. The onsite restaurant looks fabulous and prices are very reasonable. Across the road to shops, Kmart / Coles etc. On both occasions i spoke with Kerri at reception and she did everything possible to try and fit us in when we wanted to come back - she called back when she said she would and although she couldn't find anything for us, she called us straight back to advice  - what an asset to your establishment.
A lovely site in a great location. Great ammenities and very social. Great for families and pet friendly.
Beautiful park. The best camp kitchen we have seen or used. Everything you need is there and bbq are the bomb with adjustable temperature.
Everything is beautifully maintained and clean, great location and lots of fun for the kids. Loved it!

This park is probably the best we stayed at on this trip but we won't be back. It seems to be a park of two sides. On one side there are large sites with slabs covered with artificial grass for both the van and awning area. The other side has sites with mud after rain and matting which stays wet. The vans hang over onto the road requiring witches hats so drivers don't hit them. When your car is parked you need to be careful you don't open the door into the neighbours van or your awning. Neighbours congregate on the road because the sites aren't big enough. This side of the park is also against the main road where road noise can be a problem. The facilities are clean and pool / restaurant is nice but is aimed at families with kids using the waterslide. This park was 50% more expensive than the 2nd most expensive on this trip so I didn't expect water saving shower heads. It is waterfront but not beachfront. So for us, it wasn't worth the premium price.
Great location and facilities, friendly staff.  Very clean park.
Stayed on site 84. The absolute best site so far in our 8 weeks to date. Amenities modern and clean. Shops and beach are just outside the gates. Could not be a better location.
Enjoyed our stay and every interaction with staff was friendly and informative.

Big4 Caloundra was amazing ! Great location to beach / shops , plenty to do within the Big4 for everyone . Great pool and slides area and bar / restaurant really well priced and great food and drinks.
We will definitely head back

We love this place, the staff are so nice friendly and accommodating to assist with our requests.
The layout of the park continues to develop and improve year over year, great job.

We paid $1450 for our 26 night stay 2025 and rebooked 25 nights for next year 2026 and it’s $2250.
That’s an $800 increase from one year to the next. We are repeat customers in the park and find it getting out of reach.
Thank you for a lovely stay.
Beautiful resort 5 stars
Very clean and beautifully presented by Jane 🥰

Perfect accomodation for our first holiday as a family of four. The fully furnished cabin we stayed was perfect. Everything is conveniently located from the kitchen appliances to the storage compartments for your belongings. Our cabin was so tidy and exceptionally clean thanks to Sienna.  Would recommend 100%.
Room was beautiful with a lovely welcome msg. Great location, easy to get around and fabulous staff. Thanks Brooke for my lovely room
Exceptional facilities, friendly staff and great locations

Fantastic resort style caravan park. We were in our motor home, the spaces are great. Clean amenities.
The pool area is services by the restaurant and bar that overlooks it.
Really good coffee from the coffee van on site

Very clean park with great amenities and awesome camp kitchen, unfortunately our site was next too a walk through, and is the most we have paid for any site, very pricey for August. Would be great for families though.

Beautiful place to stay so clean and resort style playground pool and restaurant special happy hour our stay was extremely enjoyable made n6 friends wish we could have stayed longer  will be back next year 👏❤️❤️

Thank you so much,  everyone had a ball.
Great job Big 4
Walk out the back gate to the beach. Very good size caravan parks.

Big 4 at Caloundra has tourism and hospitality down to a fine art.
From check-in- reception staff are very professional and welcoming- to set up, our stay couldn’t be faulted.
Top site- all weather surface- and proximity to facilities was another plus.
Walking distance to some great restaurants and coffee shops make’s Caloundra Big 4 a must for a return visit.

We recently stayed in a Banksia cabin. It was modern and very comfortable. Our cabin was spotless on arrival (thank you, Nikki). Beds were comfy and we all slept well here. The pool/slides are the highlight of this park. Such a shame the weather wasn’t a little warmer during our stay. Location is good. Close to restaurants, cafes, supermarket, walking tracks, beach etc. highly recommend ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Great 2 night stay. Lovely pool and kids area - loved the food and fire on the deck.

We recently stayed at this caravan park and while there are definitely some positives, there were a few things that left us disappointed—mainly around pricing.

I booked over the phone and was told the park was full, with only a premium site available at $123 per night. On arrival, however, the park didn’t appear full at all. The premium site we were given was only marginally larger and still very close to a busy road—so I’m unsure what justified the extra cost.

I can see the appeal for families: the swimming pool and close proximity to Sunshine Coast attractions are great. The grounds are exceptionally well maintained and I appreciated the no smoking policy and that dogs are welcome—two lovely touches.

However, the price point was hard to swallow, especially after chatting with fellow campers from interstate who were paying nearly half what we paid ($65 per night). The difference in pricing didn’t make sense and left us feeling a bit taken advantage of.

If you plan to stay here, my advice would be to shop around and keep an eye on pricing—it seems to vary widely and isn’t always transparent.

Very well presented park in a great location, next to the beach and esplanade leading to cafes and restaurants. The shopping centre and supermarkets are also within easy walking distance. There is a good restaurant/ bar on site that is reasonably priced. The pool area is beautifully landscaped. We stayed on a powered site and the amenities block was maintained to a consistently high standard in cleanliness. The only negative we had of the park was that our site was tight for our large van, but nonetheless, an enjoyable stay.

A  recent caravan stay.
Friendly, personable attention at Reception.
Top quality site. Possibly the best we have experienced in 20 years of caravanning. Beautiful position on the water with a great
water view. Site 214 for those interested.

Completely booked out during the weekend of our stay due to a local sporting event. But this did not interupt our stay at all. A very pleasant park. Staff keep you posted and clearly work hard to keep everything running smoothly no matter how busy they may be. This was our first stay. Extremely comfortable, great location, plenty to see. Thank you. We enjoyed our family catch up for our daughters 40th birthday 😘

This is lovely park with friendly staff. The sites were great and we had an excellent position - a bit costly but that's how it is through school holidays. The coffee shop (caravan) had excellent coffee and 'goodies' and the bar & restaurant had great food and staff. The bingo night was excellent :).
G Clifton
Excellent location, best kitchen facilities we've encountered.

Our second time staying here! Great family friendly park. The pool and restaurant is great, with great staff. Only down fall this trip was having a site along back fence with the traffic. Traffic was loud at time. First visit the site was in a fantastic spot, especially for the kids.

The Big 4 Caloundra Waterfront exceeded expectations. Perfect site to get into, close to the most amazing, clean and up-to-date kitchen with outside fire pit; and with the cleanest amenities block we’ve come across. Then to top it off, we were blown away with the Restaurant, Pool and water slides, children’s fun play activities, absolute resort style and close to the walking track alongside the water; with Tom & Andy’s great coffee van parked nearby. A home away from home, sadly our stay wasn’t long enough and we can’t wait to return. Dave & Lee
Caravan site power water fake grass level dog friendly
We stayed here on the way up to NQ and felt comfortable to stay on the way back. Already working out the site for next time.

Great location, awesome facilities and fantastic staff.
And we came back for more.

Friendly safe and very helpful.
I'll be back
Clean and tidy amenities, great staff and fantastic location.
Stunning location and wonderful caravan park with staff that go out of their way to make your stay enjoyable, we will definitely be back

We stayed 7 nights in one of the family cabins and had the most wonderful time! Cabin was beautifully clean and had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. We loved being able to get freshly made coffees every morning before we started our days adventures. We visited Bluey World, Aussie World, the Ginger Factory and Australia Zoo - all in an easy drive from the park.

Absolutely stunning place to stay . We stayed 7 days and our location with caravan perfect . Staff amazing , so helpful and friendly and welcoming.

Once again we weren’t disappointed!!
The park layout, beautiful greenery, new age camp kitchen with a fire pit and staff providing toasted marshmallows for the kids. The tavern that overlooks a heated pool with slides has great food especially the burgers!! All staff were friendly and helpful. Such a pity we had to go home.

Brilliant park.

We stayed in a cabin and it was so luxurious!

Place has a lovely feel to it and we look forward to coming back.

Only neg was in winter the pool felt a tad chilly not the advertised 28 but it is lovely and the restaurant staff are super.

Our son loved the jump pad.

Thanks for a great stay.
Just spent a week in a cabin. Great facilities, good location and very helpful and friendly staff. will definitely be going back.

The staff are unfortunately a rare experience.
So incredibly friendly, so helpful, incredibly flexible and kind and on top of that not even one single ounce of negativity!

Beautiful people, beautiful park, beautiful spot.

We stayed in a Banksia cabin for 5 nights with a 5 and 2 year old. We had a great stay, and would overall recommend for families wanting somewhere in a great location, close to lots of Sunshine Coast attractions. ||Pros: |* Lovely clean, modern villa; very well equipt. Everything worked, tea/coffee, salt/pepper provided. |* Easy check in, great communication |* Exceptional clean - all facilities and right through the caravan park. Saw lots of staff cleaning and picking up rubbish. Face painter was amazing, Jumping pillow was a big hit |* Loved the games/activities in the restaurant area for kids. |* Homely feel, veggie gardens |* Amazing location, close to everything, short walk to Bullock beach (very kid friendly beach) |* Beautiful pool area, very clean and 2 super fun water slides ||Cons: |* No brakes on trundle bed - not sure if we just didn’t see them but we couldn’t use it as it kept rolling around; was actually quite unsafe for our preschooler as it skidded out from under him. |* Pool was quite cold - didn’t feel like 26-27 degrees, our son enjoyed it but was too cold for our baby. |* Very slippery on the sandstone area leading into the shallow area of pool, actually quite dangerous for the little kids who slipped serval times. Very clean nice decorated and nice overall

We had a lovely and great time at Big 4 Caloundra. It’s easy flow from booking, to checking and checking out. The park offer enough activities for the whole family. The views, bike way and coastal walk was something we value most. The rooms were clean and set up nicely. Safety is important to us and we felt safe at this park all the time. The Tom and Andy cafe van is a big plus. They offer some yummy waffles and have very friendly staff. Again, thank you for an amazing time and we will definitely recommend this place to anyone.
We were in our caravan, the site was good close to all facilities and drive through , always a bonus. Lovely to be able to have our dog with us.
Had a great stay, only down side is the kids and adults riding around on bikes, scooter and the go karts without helmets on the roads. Had to emergency stop a few times to avoid hitting anyway

Don’t bother booking if you’re travelling Australia. They are not very flexible. We had our car break down needing repairs in Cairns. This BIG4 didn’t have space to amend our booking, could refund our money even given the circumstances and only offered a credit to use at their park ONLY. That’s pretty ridiculous when you’re a BIG4 member and can use your membership anywhere but can’t use a credit anywhere. Will never book a BIG4 again when travelling.

This park is a great place to stay, location is great, walking distance to cafes, restaurants and shops just across the road. The staff are happy and friendly. Everything about this park is awesome. New restaurant within the park is amazing, the pool is every child’s dream. And the lovely ladies that serve coffee and light snacks from their very cute caravan, it’s so very well thought out.
We thoroughly enjoy our stay whenever we visit. Thank you.

We always enjoy staying at this caravan park. The staff are friendly and professional. The location is great and the amenities kept clean. A big shout out to Mick, the ladies in the office and the ladies that keep the amenities clean
It was the cleanest park we have ever stayed in. Facilities were great.

Its been lovely

We had a gorgeous 5 nights over winter holidays and could not fault our stay. The staff were always present and polite, the grounds are very well maintained and sites are generous. Great park, staff were the best bit

Great location, close to everything, staff are lovely and Evelyn made our room absolutely immaculate. Thank you so much.
Very dog friendly. Amazing amenities. Just a bit cramped.

We used to love camping here, due to the location. The price has just got too expensive. The pool is too cold for us Queenslanders so we get no value. For the new price we would stay in a motel instead, which would cost a bit more.
Had the best time at the Big4 Caloundra. Great onsite facilities and friendly staff. Kids love the extra activities like the disco!

The rooms were immaculately kept and had everything we needed. The park facilities were fantastic, and everything was situated in a way that meant we adults could relax with everything around us while the kids had the time of their lives.
The only single detractor was the position of the smoke alarms in the room. They're directly over the kitchen, so they would go off even just with a boiling jug.
Lovely room and was made up beautifully by Evelyn

We spent 9 nights at Big4 Caloundra. The location is superb. Park is dog friendly. Very clean. Whilst we had no use for the camp kitchen, it was very clean and modern. Toilet/shower and laundry block were clean and tidy. Large site.
Upon check in, office staff weren’t overly friendly or informative, resulting in having to contact after hours to locate our power (which was behind our neighbours caravan) Not an issue but also things like that should be told at check in.
The pool with the waterslide was a great way to start our day. It closes at 6pm which while I understand why, a little later would’ve being nice!
Tripcony Traders restaurant- I don’t recommend. Over priced small meals that weren’t enjoyable. Didn’t enjoy the parmi. Great atmosphere but unfortunately missed the mark big time with meals in taste, price and size.
The location was an absolute winner for us. 2 minute walk to the doggy daycare.
Tom and Andy’s coffee van is a nice addition and whilst there is a jumping pillow for the kids- I think a proper playground would be appreciated!
Overall, we enjoyed our stay at Caloundra Big4 and we would be back due to being pet friendly, great location and big sites.
Facilities were very well maintained
One of  the best parks we have stayed in on our trip up north. Great staff, terrific facilities and kitchen, fresh herbs to pick freely and a fire pit!
By far my favourite Big4 in Australia. A lovely location with amazing gardens and amenities. And the coffee at Andy and Toms coffee van near the pool is the best coffee on the coast

Found the clearers very helpful and did a great job cleaning up all areas. The only thing is a lack of play equipment. Large kids unsupervised on play pillow and to ruff for smaller children and granddaughters. We had to talk to the big boys to give other children a turn. Park is keeped very clean and have stayed there a few times and liked the location. The girls found the pool a bit cold and did not think the heater was not up to temperature. Happy to stay there again.
Ver well located, well- maintained park with new on-site restaurant and pool area. Would have used restaurant more but too cold in evenings .. needs heating at this time of year.
We loved our stay at Big4 Caloundra, facilities were beautiful and clean and staff were lovely.
Absolutely loved it here. We are already looking at booking for next for a longer stay. Service was great, coffee was delicious and the kids loved the waterslide and pool. Feather fact it was winter.
Used a site not a room... awesome location and great happy hour. Loved the vibe of the camp.

Stayed at a caravan site for 4 nights,great park,lots of facilities.Amenities were always very clean,close to so many things.Easy check in & welcoming staff.

Location is good from the point of view of walking the designated pathway to Happy Valley Beach & south towards Military Point. We’d stay again but endeavour to get closer to the front.
A great getaway, loved the upgrades to the park.
Beautiful, friendly,  and perfect location
Sienna did a great job cleaning, lovely small touches. Staff allowed us into our cabin earlier than check in time. Very much appreciated

I camped in a tent. Very close to amenities and camp kitchen BBQ's etc. very clean and well maintained. Lovely grassy area. stayed on the campsite.  The Big Four  Caloundra is a great campsite  with the best facilities  ever experienced on a camping. Kitchen  is the best with all you can wish for. it is great for kids with jumping castle and magnificent pool with slides.
Restaurant is great  and walking to beaches and Caloundra  city also good take away and shops around. One critic is that it is pretty difficult to get four  caravan or trailer in the designated spaces because  all cars are in front of the caravans so cornering is very very tight. No problem is people are around as they will move their cars  but when not around ????
We loved our time here in Caloundra, the park is amazing, great for our young kids and adults also! The daily happy hour was amazing and our cabin was lovely. Can’t wait to visit again!

A blissful little hidden away slice of calm & relaxation.
Arriving to Caloundra the area seemed fine but not a high end beach town we maybe expected so going to the Big 4 here we thought "ok this might be a bit of a let down" it wasn't. The cabins where clean and the large couch soft, the grounds organised and clean the staff friendly and the cheery on the top was the gorgeous resort style pool with restaurant attached literary ordering drinks and food pool side from the handy QR code, that was luxe! The kids loved the two slides and the large pool and the little coffee van serving toasties and coffee over by the bouncy pillow was very sweet the vegan toastie devine!. My only tiny comment would be having one single vegan meal or even a vegetarian meal you could adjust vegan would be lovely i had the mushroom burger and made it vegan (that was the only option) then after that there wasn't much more than a rice poke bowl. The whole family loved our little escape and we would absolutely return for a 3-4 night away. Thank you 😊
Beautiful site, exceptionally clean and local to all Calounder has to offer. Staff are very friendly and helpful. Really enjoyed our stay and would definitely stay again.

Late check in was smooth and our site was easy to set up. Lovely evenings spent on the new Tripcony Bar/Restaurant deck with tasty food, great choice of cocktails and live music. Our pup enjoys her walks around the area. Thank you for booking the great weather for us too! See you next time!

We spent 4 nights at the BIG4 Caloundra on a caravan site.
As it was 'Beachfest' the park was full (no vacancies) - check in was very easy and the staff super friendly.
The amenities were always clean even though it pretty much rained all weekend.
The kids loved the pool on Sunday - a little too cool for the adults though, we assume it was due the amount of rain we had on Saturday and heater had not caught up.
We will be back next year.
